payload.answer: Got it—what specifically would you like to learn about knowledge graphs (e.g., what they are, schemas/ontologies, SPARQL, RDF/OWL, graph databases, construction/ingestion, or use cases)?

details: No durable knowledge was committed because the input is an open-ended request without concrete facts to store.
